calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Wednesday, March 23, 2016, in Department 525:

No Appearance by Anthony Alioto, Respondent/Plaintiff.
Dennis Patton Ruel, Esq.,((415) 398-6827) counsel for Appellant/Defendant Dennis Ruel dba THE HAPKIDO INSTITUTE who is not present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Dennis Patton Ruel is sworn.

Counsel Ruel testifies on behalf of Appellant/Defendant, Dennis Ruel and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - Commercial Lease and deposit receipt.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem Diana Kruze; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-28-2016 Judgment Entered
